revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Ame no Hohi]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Ame no Hohi]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Automatic wikipedia redirects" to "Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Talk:Ame no Hohi]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノホヒ, en:Ame no Hohi); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 11:33, 28 September 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノホヒ, en:Ame no Hohi); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 11:33, 28 September 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノホヒ, en:Ame no Hohi); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-25, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 11:33, 28 September 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:アメノホヒ, en:Ame no Hohi); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 11:33, 28 September 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually. [[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 11:33, 28 September 2020 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame_no_Hohi here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame_no_Hohi for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:41, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:27, 25 February 2026 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:26, 25 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/2326970 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:アメノホヒ | revid=2326970 --> [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:アメノホヒ|&curid=162679&diff=0&oldid=0}} この編輯]について。神魂神社では天穂日命が創建したとしてゐるやうなのですが（[http://www.d3.dion.ne.jp/~stan/txt0/sm1kms1.htm]とか[http://www.genbu.net/data/izumo/kamosu_title.htm]とか[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/kamosu.htm]とか）、これは違ふのでせうか。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:16 (UTC)
ネット上の調査だけですが、能義神社の祭神は天穂日命であり、これを能義大神と称してゐると云ふことのやうです（例へばここ[http://www.mitene.or.jp/~hayamine/file3/nogi.htm]）。出雲国風土記の記述がどうなつてゐるのかは知らないのですけど。[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2004年12月2日 (木) 11:31 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1271013594 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Ame no Hohi | revid=1271013594 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|category=Mythology|importance=low|myth=y|shinto=y }} {{WikiProject Mythology|attention=|needs-image= |importance=low}} }}
== Sources with incorrect information == [https://books.google.co.jp/books?id=p2QnPijAEmEC&dq=Ame+no+hohi&pg=PA922&redir_esc=y#v=onepage&q=Ame%20no%20hohi&f=false Japan Encyclopedia] seems to contain erroneous information about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tagata_Shrine| Tagata Shrine] being dedicated to Ame no Hohi. I looked on their [http://www.tagatajinja.com/philosophy.html official website] and there is no mention of Ame no Hohi being enshrined here. The Japanese version of this page contains a longer list of shrines dedicated to this deity, so I will add those to this page, but leave the reference to Tagata shrine as is until I can verify this information. [[User:Tsundokuboi|Tsundokuboi]] ([[User talk:Tsundokuboi|talk]]) 07:24, 22 January 2025 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:44, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == I know it’s not much ==
But there is a good amount of information on this guy. I’ll try to find more information on this guy eventually.
